message:
🐛 Fix scroll: throttle-only approach (no synthetic re-dispatch) (#163)

Synthetic WheelEvent re-dispatch never reaches xterm.js internal
handlers. New approach: let native events through at throttled rate
(150ms / ~7/sec), block rapid momentum events with
stopImmediatePropagation. xterm.js handles the native events normally
for both scrollback and tmux mouse escape sequences.

- 13 scroll tests covering throttle, direction, suppressScroll, scope
- 29 total tests passing

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
